### What & why
What you'd like, and the problem it solves.

### Security considerations
Any impact on keys, KDFs, or the threat model (see
[THREAT_MODEL.md](https://github.com/ArxSecretorum/arxnotes-crypto/blob/main/THREAT_MODEL.md))?
